wardrobe.emptyBody: Scan your first outfit to build your digital wardrobe

screen2.title: What is your style?
screen2.body: We will help you discover it

welcome.title: Welcome to AWEAR
welcome.body: Your digital wardrobe, wherever you go. Scan clothes, discover looks, and build your personal style.

styleQuiz.title: Your style, your rules
styleQuiz.body: Tell us what you love and we will surface looks that match your taste — from your own closet and beyond.

camera.title: Scan any item in seconds
camera.body: Point your camera at a clothing item and AWEAR adds it to your wardrobe instantly. Your camera stays private.

cameraPermission.iosUsageDescription: AWEAR uses your camera to scan clothing into your digital wardrobe.
cameraPermission.title: See your wardrobe, instantly
cameraPermission.body: AWEAR uses your camera to scan clothing items so you can build a digital wardrobe and get outfit ideas. We only use the camera when you choose to scan something.
cameraPermission.grantedBody: You're all set. AWEAR can scan clothing items whenever you're ready.
cameraPermission.deniedBody: Wardrobe scanning needs your camera. You can turn it on in your device settings whenever you're ready.
cameraPermission.deniedRetryBody: Camera access is required to scan your wardrobe. Allow it to continue.

feed.title: Feed
feed.error: Could not load feed. Pull down to retry.

wardrobe.emptyBody: Scan your first outfit to build your digital wardrobe
